title: stelis purpurina
intro: Stelis purpurina, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to Central America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis purpurina are attributed to its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis purpurina are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
